2026-04-17.content:
App Optimize API is in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).
App Optimize API helps you to monitor, analyze, and improve the
performance and cost-efficiency of your cloud applications.

summary.title: App Optimize API now in Preview
summary.summary: The App Optimize API is now available in Preview. This API helps you monitor, analyze, and improve the performance and cost-efficiency of your cloud applications.
